symptoms: POST /payments/{id}/refund returns HTTP 200 but refund_status stays as 'pending'
Stripe dashboard shows no refund initiated
Customer service: 80 tickets about refunds not appearing
confirmed_root_cause: Exception in Stripe API call was silently caught and swallowed by a bare except: pass block introduced in error handling refactor. Endpoint returned 200 even on failure.
resolution_action: Removed bare except: pass. Added proper exception handling with logging and 500 response. Manually initiated 80 pending refunds via Stripe dashboard.
